architectReview.evidence: G006 final aggregate review is clean. AI slop cleanup agent://155-G006CleanupFinal returned CLEAR/CLEAR/CLEAR with no blockers for final code/test changes. Architect aggregate review agent://156-G006ArchitectAggregate returned CLEAR/CLEAR/CLEAR APPROVE with no blockers, confirming G001-G005 durable receipts, G006 pre-checkpoint active state, product-scope final verification, and clean G004/G005 quality gates. The raw npm run lint failure is limited to .gjc runtime team worktree nested Biome configs; product-scope Biome check passed and build/test/typecheck/prisma passed.

executorQa.evidence: Executor QA readiness agent://158-G006ExecutorQaReadiness passed with no blockers. It verified G001-G005 are complete with per-goal receipts, G006 is correctly active pre-checkpoint, no failed/blocked/pending required goals remain, final verification report records product-scope Biome check, typecheck, npm test, Prisma validate, and build success, and /packages force-dynamic build-time DB prerender fix is present and tested.
e2eCommands: npx biome check app components docs lib prisma proxy.ts scripts specs tests next.config.mjs package.json tsconfig.json vercel.json vitest.config.ts

artifactRefs.description: Final verification report with product-scope Biome, typecheck, test, Prisma validate, build, and durable-status evidence.

contractCoverage.obligation: G001-G005 are complete with per-goal receipts and no failed/blocked/pending required goals remain before G006 checkpoint.
Product-scope lint/check, typecheck, tests, Prisma validate, and production build pass with current source.
Inline goal completion remains pending until after the G006 checkpoint creates the final aggregate receipt.

surfaceEvidence.invocation: product-scope Biome check; npm run typecheck; npm test; npx prisma validate; npm run build
gjc ultragoal status --json plus goals.json/ledger.jsonl read-only audit before checkpoint

adversarialCases.scenario: A prior required goal lacks a durable per-goal receipt.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Final QA fails unless G001-G005 are complete with completionVerification receipt evidence.

adversarialCases.scenario: A required goal remains failed, blocked, review_blocked, pending, or supersession-incomplete.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Final QA fails unless pending/failed/blocked counts are zero except active G006 awaiting checkpoint.

adversarialCases.scenario: Root lint failure is incorrectly hidden as a pass.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Report distinguishes .gjc runtime-state interference from product-source verification and requires product-scope Biome check to pass.

adversarialCases.scenario: The DB-backed /packages page is statically prerendered and fails without a live database.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: /packages exports force-dynamic, its contract test preserves the directive, and production build passes.

adversarialCases.scenario: Inline goal is completed before final durable checkpoint receipt exists.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Pre-checkpoint QA treats G006 active state as expected and requires leader to checkpoint before inline completion.

iteration.evidence: AI SLOP CLEANUP REPORT: agent://155-G006CleanupFinal was CLEAR with no blockers. Final aggregate architect review agent://156-G006ArchitectAggregate was CLEAR/CLEAR/CLEAR APPROVE with no blockers. Executor QA readiness agent://158-G006ExecutorQaReadiness passed with no blockers. Full rerun evidence includes product-scope Biome check, typecheck, full npm test with 145 tests, Prisma validate, and production build. Root npm run lint failure is recorded as .gjc runtime-state nested Biome config interference and not treated as product-source failure because explicit product-scope Biome check passed.
rerunCommands: npx biome check --write app components docs lib prisma proxy.ts scripts specs tests next.config.mjs package.json tsconfig.json vercel.json vitest.config.ts
